versions.verifyHtml:
kubectl get servicetemplates -A
# NAMESPACE    NAME                            VALID
# kcm-system   open-webui-14-1-0               true
versions.deployHtml:
apiVersion: k0rdent.mirantis.com/v1beta1
kind: MultiClusterService
metadata:
  name: open-webui
spec:
  clusterSelector:
    matchLabels:
      group: demo
  serviceSpec:
    services:
    - template: open-webui-14-1-0
      name: open-webui
      namespace: open-webui
      values: |
        open-webui:
          pipelines:
            enabled: false
          persistence:
            enabled: false

examples.title: With Ingress
examples.installHtml:
helm upgrade --install traefik oci://ghcr.io/k0rdent/catalog/charts/kgst \
  --set "chart=traefik:39.0.5" \
  -n kcm-system
helm upgrade --install open-webui oci://ghcr.io/k0rdent/catalog/charts/kgst \
  --set "chart=open-webui:8.12.3" \
  -n kcm-system
examples.verifyHtml:
kubectl get servicetemplates -A
# NAMESPACE    NAME                            VALID
# kcm-system   traefik-39-0-5                  true
# kcm-system   open-webui-8-12-3               true
examples.deployHtml:
apiVersion: k0rdent.mirantis.com/v1beta1
kind: MultiClusterService
metadata:
  name: open-webui
spec:
  clusterSelector:
    matchLabels:
      group: demo
  serviceSpec:
    services:
    - template: traefik-39-0-5
      name: traefik
      namespace: open-webui
      values: |
        traefik:
          deployment:
            kind: DaemonSet
          ports:
            web:
              port: 8000
              hostPort: 80
            websecure:
              port: 8443
              hostPort: 443
    - template: open-webui-8-12-3
      name: open-webui
      namespace: open-webui
      values: |
        open-webui:
          ingress:
            enabled: true
            host: 'openwebui.example.com'

examples.title: With GPU
examples.contentHtml:
This setup requires corresponding cluster setup, see NVIDIA GPU Operator

apiVersion: k0rdent.mirantis.com/v1beta1
kind: MultiClusterService
metadata:
name: open-webui
spec:
  clusterSelector:
    matchLabels:
      group: demo
  serviceSpec:
    services:
    - template: open-webui-8-12-3
      name: open-webui
      namespace: open-webui
      values: |
        open-webui:
          ollama:
            ollama:
              gpu:
                enabled: true
                type: 'nvidia'
                number: 1
              models:
                pull: [llama3.2:3b]
                run: [llama3.2:3b]
          ingress:
            enabled: true
            host: 'openwebui.example.com'

examples.title: Without GPU
examples.contentHtml:
Tested on worker instanceType: t3.xlarge and rootVolumeSize: 32: 

apiVersion: k0rdent.mirantis.com/v1beta1
kind: ClusterDeployment
metadata:
  name: aws-example
spec:
  template: aws-standalone-cp-0-2-0
  credential: aws-credential
  config:
    ...
    worker:
      instanceType: t3.xlarge
      rootVolumeSize: 32
    workersNumber: 1

Tested service configuration: 

apiVersion: k0rdent.mirantis.com/v1beta1
kind: MultiClusterService
metadata:
  name: open-webui
spec:
  clusterSelector:
    matchLabels:
      group: demo
  serviceSpec:
    services:
    - template: open-webui-8-12-3
      name: open-webui
      namespace: open-webui
      values: |
        open-webui:
          ollama:
            ollama:
              models:
                pull: [smollm:135m]
                run: [smollm:135m]
          ingress:
            enabled: true
            host: 'openwebui.example.com'
